name: guides_chapter
schema:
CREATE TABLE "guides_chapter" (
   "id" INTEGER,
   "created" TEXT,
   "slug" TEXT,
   "metadata" TEXT,
   "card_image" TEXT,
   "is_draft" INTEGER,
   "updated" TEXT,
   "title" TEXT,
   "body" TEXT,
   "order" INTEGER,
   "is_unlisted" INTEGER,
   "series_id" INTEGER REFERENCES "blog_series"("id"),
   "guide_id" INTEGER REFERENCES "guides_guide"("id"),
   "section_id" INTEGER REFERENCES "guides_guidesection"("id")
)
